CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2009 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2009 Continued To Sep-15-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-01-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-01-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-04-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Presiding Judge Dept. for settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: L. Jones.
Robert Resner, Esq. for Plaintiff Creditors Trade Assoc, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, and with Witness Bazel Fadel.
Defendant Ahmed Rachid Aloidi present in pro per and with Arabic Interpreter Yehya Korin.
Parties reached a settlement, terms were read into the record as follows:
Defendant agreed to make a payment of $1,500.00 to Plaintiff on or before June 10, 2009, and payment of $1,500.00 on or before July 10, 2009.
If Defendant failed, Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment enter in the amount of $4,000.00 less any payment made against the Defendant by an ex parte application to the Court.
Parties agreed to terms in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled, vacated the trial and placed the matter on the CRC 3.1385 dismissal calendar for Aug. 4, 2009 at 10 a.m. in Dept. 212.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents; Request For Admissions And Responses To Pltf'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Form Interrogatories And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s Motion to compel response to request for production of documents; request for admissions and responses to plaintiff's first set of special interrogatories; form interrogatories; and award of monetary sanctions granted as follows:
1. All objections to the specified discovery are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
a. Within seven days of the date of service of this order, defendant shall serve full, complete, verified responses to plaintiff's form interrogatories, special interrogatories, and Request For Production Of Documents;
2. The matters set forth in plaintiff's request for admission are deemed admitted;
3. Request for an award of monetary sanctions is granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $390.00, payable within thirty days of the date of service of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
